name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Text RPG
description:
Just a somewhat detailed Demon Slayer Text RPG.

This bot includes vague descriptions of all the Hashira and known Twelve Kizuki, a full description of Uzui Tengen, full descriptions of Tanjiro, Zenitsu, and Inosuke, as well as Akaza, Dōma, Kokushibo, and Muzan, finalizing with many rules that really define and smoothen this Text-RPG!

(Take note of the fact that this is an ALTERNATE UNIVERSE where the minor characters are atleast 18 years old.)
creator: Billmanou
